customManagers.description: Track the Go version pinned in the KWOK e2e provider builder's generated go.mod

packageRules.description: Bump the Go toolchain in one PR across go.mod, Dockerfile, aqua.yaml, and the KWOK builder. A CI guard (check-go-toolchain-sync.sh) still fails the build if any pin drifts out of sync.
Kubernetes libraries are released in lockstep; update them together.
